assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states Regular channel clusters will auto-upgrade to 1.31 before EoS and confirms force-upgrade applies to all clusters at EoS

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly states that Extended channel support for 1.30 ends March 2025 (same as standard support) and that Extended only provides longer support for 1.27+ versions. This contradicts the expectation that Extended channel provides significantly more time for 1.30

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states that control plane and nodes are both upgraded to 1.31 and that any per-nodepool 'no auto-upgrade' settings will be overridden for EoS enforcement

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands for adding maintenance exclusions with 'no_upgrades' scope and mentions they can block auto-upgrades temporarily

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed preparation strategy with phases, immediate actions, and recommends planning manual upgrades before forced upgrades occur

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Cloud Logging or EoS notifications as planning tools

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Review GKE deprecation insights in console' in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response recommends auto-upgrade as the preferred path and advises planning around EoS rather than trying to prevent it, implying that manual freezing should be avoided
